action.reasoning: Observation: the new privileged predictive controller improved local dense proxies to safe_follow_steps 32.4 over 10 episodes, the best local result so far, while runtime stayed reasonable (~8.5 min for train+local test). Analysis: although full evals have remained at 0 seek success, this is the first materially better local proxy in several iterations, so the highest-value action is to measure it on the real 50-episode harness now rather than spend more iterations tuning without feedback. Decision: submit the current checkpoint for evaluation.
